title: The Calm Voice on the Line

tree.setup: Evening on a quiet residential street. A neighbor's kitchen is filling with smoke — not a fire exactly, more of a very ambitious cooking experiment gone wrong. Old Mr. Zheng from next door is standing outside coughing and looking bewildered, holding a spatula like a flag of surrender. You need to call for help.
tree.setup_zh: 安静的住宅街道上的傍晚。邻居的厨房里烟雾弥漫——不完全算火灾，更像是一次过于有野心的烹饪实验失败了。隔壁的郑大爷站在外面咳嗽，一脸茫然，举着一把锅铲像举着投降的白旗。你需要打电话求助。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_pinyin: yāo yāo jiǔ, xiāofáng. qǐngwèn shénme qíngkuàng?

options.text_zh: 你好，我邻居家厨房着火了，有很多烟。他已经出来了，人没事，但是烟越来越大。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ línjū jiā chúfáng zháo huǒ le, yǒu hěn duō yān. tā yǐjīng chūlái le, rén méi shì, dànshì yān yuè lái yuè dà.
options.text_en: Hello, my neighbor's kitchen caught fire — there's a lot of smoke. He's already out and OK, but the smoke is getting worse.
options.feedback: Clear, organized, covering the essentials: what happened, is anyone hurt, is it getting worse. The dispatcher sounds relieved to get a coherent report.

options.text_pinyin: yǒu huǒ! wǒ línjū jiā zháo huǒ le!
options.text_en: Fire! My neighbor's house is on fire!
options.feedback: Urgent and clear enough. The dispatcher will ask follow-up questions to fill in the details.
The urgency is clear, but the dispatcher needs more: where, how bad, anyone inside? She'll walk you through it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的。请告诉我地址。在哪个小区？几号楼？
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de. qǐng gàosu wǒ dìzhǐ. zài nǎge xiǎoqū? jǐ hào lóu?
turns.text_en: OK. Please tell me the address. Which residential compound? Which building number?

options.text_zh: 在和平路十八号院，三号楼，一楼。门口有一棵很大的银杏树。
options.text_pinyin: zài Hépíng Lù shíbā hào yuàn, sān hào lóu, yī lóu. ménkǒu yǒu yì kē hěn dà de yínxìng shù.
options.text_en: 18 Heping Road compound, building 3, first floor. There's a big ginkgo tree at the entrance.
options.feedback: Precise address plus a landmark — the ginkgo tree is an excellent detail for the fire truck.
The compound name is enough to start — she'll ask for the building number next.

options.text_zh: 我不记得具体地址了，就在和平路附近。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ bú jìde jùtǐ dìzhǐ le, jiù zài Hépíng Lù fùjìn.
options.text_en: I don't remember the exact address — it's near Heping Road.
options.feedback: In an emergency, approximate is better than nothing. The dispatcher will work with it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 收到。消防车马上出发。请问楼里还有没有其他人？
turns.text_pinyin: shōu dào. xiāofáng chē mǎshàng chūfā. qǐngwèn lóu lǐ hái yǒu méiyǒu qítā rén?
turns.text_en: Received. Fire truck is on its way. Are there other people still in the building?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell her about the other residents.

options.text_zh: 楼里应该还有几户人家。我去叫他们出来。
options.text_pinyin: lóu lǐ yīnggāi hái yǒu jǐ hù rénjiā. wǒ qù jiào tāmen chūlái.
options.text_en: There should be a few other families. I'll go tell them to come out.
options.feedback: Proactive and helpful. She adds:「注意安全，不要进到有烟的地方。」
Honest. The team will check when they arrive.

options.text_zh: 郑大爷已经出来了，其他人我不知道。
options.text_pinyin: Zhèng dàyé yǐjīng chūlái le, qítā rén wǒ bù zhīdào.
options.text_en: Old Mr. Zheng is already out — I don't know about the others.
options.feedback: Partial info is still useful. She notes Mr. Zheng's name.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的，注意安全。消防车大概五分钟到。请在安全的地方等着，不要回到楼里去。
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de, zhùyì ānquán. xiāofáng chē dàgài wǔ fēnzhōng dào. qǐng zài ānquán de dìfāng děng zhe, búyào huí dào lóu lǐ qù.
turns.text_en: OK, stay safe. Fire truck in about five minutes. Wait somewhere safe and don't go back inside.

options.text_zh: 好的，我们在门口等。谢谢你！
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒmen zài ménkǒu děng. xièxie nǐ!
options.text_en: OK, we'll wait at the entrance. Thank you!
options.feedback: Calm and compliant. Mr. Zheng is still holding his spatula, but at least everyone is safe.
Brief and understood. The sirens are already faintly audible.
Understandable panic. Five minutes feels like an hour when smoke is rising.

tree.cultural_note: China's emergency numbers: 119 for fire (消防), 120 for ambulance (急救), 110 for police (报警). Chinese addresses go from largest to smallest: road, compound number, building, floor, apartment.
